meta.title: About Us | MD Supply
meta.description: MD Supply (MD Supply LLC) is a reliable supplier for retail, wholesale, HoReCa and online stores. Our mission, values, work approach, and wholesale distribution across the CIS.

header.title: About MD Supply
header.description: A reliable supplier for retail, wholesale, HoReCa and online stores: direct manufacturer contracts, a broad product range, CIS-wide logistics and a full document package. Requests handled within one business day.

whoWeAre.title: The reliable link between manufacturer and point of sale
whoWeAre.p1: {legalName} is a wholesale supplier and distributor of a broad product range. We build a distribution model that covers the full journey of a product — from procurement at the manufacturer to shelf presence and sales growth for our partners.
whoWeAre.p2: We supply goods to retail chains, neighborhood stores, HoReCa venues, and online stores across the CIS. The team behind the company brings hands-on experience in procurement, sales, and logistics.
whoWeAre.p3: Our core value is partner relationships built on accountability, transparent terms, and reliable deliveries.

mission.heading: Mission
mission.text: Make quality goods accessible to businesses across the CIS — through uninterrupted supply, fair terms, and service you can count on.

items.title: Partnership
items.text: We build long-term relationships where both sides win.

items.title: Results
items.text: We own sales volumes and shelf presence, not just shipments.

items.title: Accountability
items.text: We keep our word on timelines, quality, and terms.

items.title: Growth
items.text: We adopt new tools in distribution, analytics, and logistics.

approach.title: How we deliver results
approach.description: We are a young company, but we operate to professional standards — backed by team experience and well-tuned processes.

items.title: Experienced team
items.text: The people behind the project have real expertise in distribution, procurement, and logistics.

items.title: Streamlined processes
items.text: Order intake, fulfillment, and dispatch run as one seamless mechanism.

items.title: Direct contracts
items.text: We source directly from manufacturers — fair pricing and guaranteed origin.

items.title: Flexibility for partners
items.text: We adapt the product range and terms to fit your sales channel and business format.

jobs.title: Sales Representative
jobs.desc: Managing existing client accounts (HoReCa, retail chains), growing sales volume, and maintaining product display standards.

jobs.desc: Receiving, storing, and picking orders in the warehouse; working with barcode scanners.

jobs.title: Driver-Forwarder
jobs.desc: Delivering goods to clients across Minsk and suburbs, handling accompanying shipping documentation.

Delivery.disclaimer: This section is for informational purposes only. Exact delivery and payment terms — minimum order amount, lead times, and rates — are agreed individually and set out in the supply contract.

meta.title: FAQ
meta.description: Answers to common questions from MD Supply clients and partners: terms of cooperation, price list, delivery regions, payment, and partnerships.

header.title: Frequently Asked Questions
header.description: We've compiled answers to the most common questions from clients and partners. Didn't find what you need? Contact us.

items.q: Do you work only with wholesale clients?
items.a: We operate wholesale only — supplying goods to retail chains, stores, HoReCa venues, and online stores. We do not engage in retail sales.

items.q: How do I get a price list and a commercial offer?
items.a: Submit a request via the 'Request a Quote' form — a manager will send you the current price list and a personalised offer tailored to your sales channel.

items.q: Which regions do you deliver to?
items.a: We supply goods across all CIS countries. Delivery within Minsk is available on the next business day.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: For legal entities and sole traders — bank transfer under contract, with deferred payment available by arrangement. We provide a full set of accompanying documents.

items.q: Can I become a supplier or introduce my brand?
items.a: Yes. We are open to new brands and manufacturers. Reach out via the Cooperation section — we will review the distribution terms for your products.

items.q: Is there a minimum order value?
items.a: The minimum order value and dispatch terms depend on the sales channel and region. Your manager will agree on the exact parameters individually when signing the contract.

meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: MD Supply personal data processing policy in accordance with the Republic of Belarus Personal Data Protection Law No. 99-Z of 7 May 2021.

header.title: Privacy Policy
header.description: How we process and protect the personal data of website visitors in accordance with the legislation of the Republic of Belarus.

s1.title: General Provisions
s1.p1: This Privacy Policy sets out the procedure for processing and protecting the personal data of users of the website {url} (hereinafter — the Website), the operator of which is {operator}, Tax ID (UNP) {unp} (hereinafter — the Operator).
s1.p2: The Policy has been developed in accordance with the Republic of Belarus Personal Data Protection Law No. 99-Z of 7 May 2021 'On Personal Data Protection' and other regulatory legal acts of the Republic of Belarus.

s2.title: Categories of Data Processed
s2.intro: The Operator processes personal data that the user voluntarily provides when completing forms on the Website:
s2.i1: name (and, where applicable, the name of the organisation);
s2.i2: contact details: telephone number and/or e-mail address;
s2.i3: the text of the enquiry and any other information provided by the user;

s3.title: Purposes of Processing
s3.i1: handling enquiries, applications and requests for commercial proposals;
s3.i2: communicating with the user, including call-back requests;
s3.i3: providing information about products, services and terms of cooperation;
s3.i4: improving the Website and analysing visitor statistics.

s4.title: Legal Grounds and Consent
s4.p1: Personal data are processed on the basis of the data subject's consent, which is given when the user submits a form on the Website by ticking the relevant checkbox. Consent may be withdrawn at any time by contacting the Operator using the details set out in Section 8.

s5.title: Retention Period and Conditions
s5.p1: Personal data are retained no longer than is required for the purposes of processing, or until consent is withdrawn. Once the purposes of processing have been achieved or consent has been withdrawn, the data shall be deleted or anonymised.

s6.title: Disclosure to Third Parties
s6.p1: The Operator does not disclose personal data to third parties, except as required by the legislation of the Republic of Belarus or with the consent of the data subject. Data may be processed by authorised persons under conditions of confidentiality.

s7.title: Cookies and Web Analytics
s7.p1: The Website uses cookies to ensure correct operation and to collect anonymised visitor statistics (web-analytics systems). Users may restrict the use of cookies in their browser settings.

s8.title: Data Subject Rights and Contacts
s8.p1: Users have the right to obtain information about the processing of their personal data, to request its rectification, blocking or deletion, and to withdraw consent. For questions regarding personal data processing, please contact us:
